business_hours.notes: Ben mentioned standard hours start at 8am. After 6pm he is generally unavailable.

integration_constraints: Jobber integration with Clara is listed as 'coming soon' at time of demo
No confirmed ServiceTrade or other field service platform
emergency_definition: Gas station pump failures for a specific property manager client
Any after-hours call that Ben personally determines as emergency
No formal emergency definition provided during demo — to be confirmed at onboarding

emergency_routing_rules.primary: Route directly to Ben Penoyer (sole on-call person)
emergency_routing_rules.notes: Ben stated he is the only person on call after hours. Greg (incoming ops manager) may take over in future.

non_emergency_routing_rules.business_hours: Clara collects caller name, number, job type, preferred date/time — sends notification to Ben
non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Clara collects details, confirms follow-up during business hours next day
non_emergency_routing_rules.special_numbers: Certain trusted contractor numbers bypass Clara and ring Ben directly

call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: Not specified — to be confirmed at onboarding

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Ask purpose. Determine if emergency. If emergency: collect name, number, address and attempt transfer to Ben. If non-emergency: collect details and assure follow-up next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Ask purpose. Collect name, phone number, job type, preferred date/time. Send notification to Ben (email + SMS). Suggest site visit or estimate booking where appropriate.
call_volume_estimate: 20 to 50 calls per week (mix of customers, contractors, inspectors, sales calls)
questions_or_unknowns: Exact business hours (days and end time not confirmed — 8am start only)
Office/billing address not captured in transcript
Emergency call transfer timeout and fallback behavior
What happens if transfer to Ben fails after hours
Exact list of VIP numbers that should bypass Clara
Greg's contact details and when he takes over as point of contact
Whether Jobber integration is active by onboarding time
Weekend availability rules (Ben sometimes takes calls, sometimes defers)
notes: Ben is a sole proprietor electrician in Calgary, AB with ~8 years in business, 30 years experience. He handles all office and after-hours work himself. He is actively growing and bringing on an operations manager (Greg). He uses Jobber as CRM and QuickBooks for accounting. He is brand new to AI — this was his first AI interaction. He agreed to a 3-month starter plan at $249/month (500 min/month). Kickoff call scheduled for the day after the demo.
